heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Fritz Lang. Written by Thea von Harbou and Fritz Lang.
clean: Directed by Fritz Lang. Written by Thea von Harbou and Fritz Lang.

heading: Freder
raw: I must have a person who is faithful to me, Josaphat - how else will I be able to fulfill my destiny?
clean: I must have a person who is faithful to me, Josaphat - how else will I be able to fulfill my destiny?

heading: Freder
raw: To the new Tower of Babel - to my father!
clean: To the new Tower of Babel - to my father!

heading: Maria
raw: There can be no understanding between the hand and the head unless the heart acts as mediator.
clean: There can be no understanding between the hand and the head unless the heart acts as mediator.

heading: Maria
raw: Look! These are your brothers! Look! These are your brothers!
clean: Look! These are your brothers! Look! These are your brothers!

heading: The Machine Man
raw: [disguised as Maria] Who is the living food for the machines in Metropolis? Who lubricates the machine joints with their own blood? Who feeds the machines with their own flesh? Let the machines starve, you fools! Let them die! Kill them - the machines!
clean: Who is the living food for the machines in Metropolis? Who lubricates the machine joints with their own blood? Who feeds the machines with their own flesh? Let the machines starve, you fools! Let them die! Kill them - the machines!

heading: The Machine Man
raw: [disguised as Maria] Women and men, let no one miss today! Death to the machines!
clean: Women and men, let no one miss today! Death to the machines!

heading: The Machine Man
raw: [disguised as Maria] Let's all watch as the world goes to the devil!
clean: Let's all watch as the world goes to the devil!

heading: Other
raw: Man at Nightclub: For her, all seven deadly sins!
clean: For her, all seven deadly sins!

heading: Other
raw: C.A. Rotwang - the Inventor: She is the most perfect and most obedient tool which mankind ever possessed! Tonight you will see her succeed before the upper ten thousand. You will see her dance...
clean: She is the most perfect and most obedient tool which mankind ever possessed! Tonight you will see her succeed before the upper ten thousand. You will see her dance...

heading: Dialogue
raw: Joh Frederson: What were you doing in the machine halls, Freder?
clean: What were you doing in the machine halls, Freder?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Freder: I wanted to look into the faces of the people whose little children are my brothers, my sisters...
clean: I wanted to look into the faces of the people whose little children are my brothers, my sisters...

heading: Dialogue
raw: Freder: Your magnificent city, Father - and you the brain of this city - and all of us in the city's light...And where are the people, Father, whose hands built your city?
clean: Your magnificent city, Father - and you the brain of this city - and all of us in the city's light...And where are the people, Father, whose hands built your city?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Freder: In the depths...? What if one day, those in the depths rise up against you?
clean: In the depths...? What if one day, those in the depths rise up against you?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Grot - the Guardian of the Heart Machine: Who told you to attack the machines, you fools? Without them you'll all die!
clean: Who told you to attack the machines, you fools? Without them you'll all die!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Working Woman: It's the witch's fault!
